name: teams-demo-page
description: Create proof-of-work demo page demonstrating teams feature end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Page shows 'Create Organization' form when no orgs exist
Creating org displays org details and 'Add Team' option
Teams display with hierarchy visualization (nested teams indented)
Adding team shows parent team selector for hierarchy
Creating app within team shows app in team's app list
Membership management UI shows add/remove member with role selector
Permission resolution demo shows effective permissions at each level
All CRUD operations work end-to-end with MockTeamsService
Loading states shown during async operations
Error states handled gracefully with user feedback
